text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: That's too bad. And you were so close.
choice_data_list: I'm sorry I couldn't get one.
I'm sorry I couldn't get one.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I told you at the start—I didn't really want one.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
We don't have time to waste. Let's just head
back.
